name: lisa
description: Universal governance — agents, skills, commands, hooks, and rules for all projects

hooks.command: command -v entire >/dev/null 2>&1 && entire hooks claude-code user-prompt-submit || true

hooks.prompt:
Classify this user request into exactly one flow. Output ONLY valid JSON.

Flows:
- Research: User needs requirements defined, wants a PRD, exploring a problem space, open-ended feature idea
- Plan: User has requirements and wants them broken into tickets/work items
- Implement/Build: User has a specific feature/story/task to code
- Implement/Fix: User has a bug to fix, something is broken
- Implement/Improve: User wants to refactor, optimize, or improve existing code
- Implement/Investigate: User wants to understand why something works a certain way (spike)
- Verify: User has code ready to ship (PR, deploy, merge)
- None: Simple question, config change, one-off task, or not enough context to classify

Output format: {"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"UserPromptSubmit","additionalContext":"Flow classification: [FLOW]. Reason: [one sentence]."}}

User request: $ARGUMENTS

hooks.command: command -v entire >/dev/null 2>&1 && entire hooks claude-code post-task || true
command -v entire >/dev/null 2>&1 && entire hooks claude-code post-todo || true
command -v entire >/dev/null 2>&1 && entire hooks claude-code pre-task || true
command -v entire >/dev/null 2>&1 && entire hooks claude-code stop || true
command -v entire >/dev/null 2>&1 && entire hooks claude-code session-start || true
command -v entire >/dev/null 2>&1 && entire hooks claude-code session-end || true
